mapper.select: select order_id from scm_order where order_no = #{orderNo} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into scm_order( order_no, hospital_id, supplier_id, tenant_id, warehouse_name, order_date, order_amount, order_status, apply_dept, remark, create_by, create_time, del_flag, spd_order_id, source_system, spd_tenant_id, spd_snapshot_hospital_code, spd_snapshot_supplier_code ) values ( #{orderNo}, #{hospitalId}, #{supplierId}, #{tenantId}, #{warehouseName}, #{orderDate}, #{orderAmount}, #{orderStatus}, #{applyDept}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, now(), '0', #{spdOrderId}, #{sourceSystem}, #{spdTenantId}, #{spdSnapshotHospitalCode}, #{spdSnapshotSupplierCode} )
mapper.update: update scm_order set hospital_id = #{hospitalId}, supplier_id = #{supplierId}, tenant_id = #{tenantId}, warehouse_name = #{warehouseName}, order_date = #{orderDate}, order_amount = #{orderAmount}, order_status = #{orderStatus}, apply_dept = #{applyDept}, remark = #{remark}, spd_order_id = #{spdOrderId}, source_system = #{sourceSystem}, spd_tenant_id = #{spdTenantId}, spd_snapshot_hospital_code = #{spdSnapshotHospitalCode}, spd_snapshot_supplier_code = #{spdSnapshotSupplierCode}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: insert into scm_order_detail( order_id, material_id, material_code, material_name, specification, model, unit, purchase_price, order_quantity, remaining_quantity, amount, manufacturer_name, register_no, remark, create_by, create_time, del_flag ) values ( #{orderId}, #{materialId}, #{materialCode}, #{materialName}, #{specification}, #{model}, #{unit}, #{purchasePrice}, #{orderQuantity}, #{remainingQuantity}, #{amount}, #{manufacturerName}, #{registerNo}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, now(), '0' )
